mapper.select:
SELECT A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID indvdlInfoId, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM indvdlInfoNm, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN indvdlInfoDc, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT indvdlInfoYn, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') frstRegistPnttm, (SELECT MBER_NM FROM LETTNGNRLMBER WHERE ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) frstRegisterNm FROM LETTNINDVDLINFOPOLICY A WHERE 1=1
AND INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM LETTNINDVDLINFOPOLICY WHERE 1=1
AND INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE LETTNINDVDLINFOPOLICY SET INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM = #{indvdlInfoNm}, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN = #{indvdlInfoDc}, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT = #{indvdlInfoYn}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = sysdate(), LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID=#{indvdlInfoId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID as indvdlInfoId, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM as indvdlInfoNm, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN as indvdlInfoDc, A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT as indvdlInfoYn, DATE_FORMAT(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') as frstRegisterPnttm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID as frstRegisterId, DATE_FORMAT(A.LAST_UPDT_PNTTM,'%Y-%m-%d') as lastUpdusrPnttm, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID as lastUpdusrId FROM LETTNINDVDLINFOPOLICY A WHERE 1=1 AND A.INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID=#{indvdlInfoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LETTNINDVDLINFOPOLICY ( INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_ID, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_NM, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_CN, INDVDL_INFO_POLICY_AGRE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{indvdlInfoId}, #{indvdlInfoNm}, #{indvdlInfoDc}, #{indvdlInfoYn}, sysdate(), #{frstRegisterId}, sysdate(), #{lastUpdusrId} )
